Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired.
I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.

Why couldn't the leopard play hide and seek? Because he was always spotted.
What did the ocean say to the shore? Nothing, it just waved.
I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.

Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one.
What did one wall say to the other? I'll meet you at the corner!

patterns: Tell me an interesting random fact
What is something mind-blowing you know?
Give me a daily trivia question
Can you recommend a fun riddle?
Share an inspiring thought with me
im so bored help me out
give me something fun to do
tell me a joke or a fact
give me a mind blowing fact
am bored tell me a story
i am extremely bored right now
do you know any fun trivia?
tell me something I dont know
what is a fun thing to learn?
i want to hear a story
responses: Did you know that honey never spoils? Archaeologists have found pots of honey in ancient Egyptian tombs that are over 3,000 years old and still edible.
Boredom is just the brain's way of asking for a new adventure! Want a riddle or a quick historical anecdote?
A snail can sleep for three years if the conditions aren't right. Pretty efficient, right?
Want to hear a story? Once, a lighthouse keeper saved a ship by signaling with his own shirt because his lamp failed.
Here's a riddle: I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body, but I come alive with wind. What am I? (An echo!)
Did you know that octopuses have three hearts and blue blood? Nature is wild.
If you're looking for inspiration, remember that every master was once a disaster. Keep going!
Let's play a game! Should we do a trivia challenge, a personality test, or just learn about space?
Bananas are technically berries, but strawberries aren't. Biology is full of surprises!
Feeling bored? Try looking up 'the velvet worm'—it's one of the weirdest creatures on the planet.
Here's a thought for your day: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
Did you know that cows have best friends and get stressed when they are separated from them?
Want a quick brain teaser? If you have three apples and you take away two, how many apples do you have? (You have two!)
Space fact: A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus. Imagine that work schedule!
Time for a story! Have you ever heard of the Great Emu War where Australia lost a war to flightless birds?
Feeling a bit sluggish? Why not learn something new, like how the internet actually travels through underwater cables?
Here is an inspiring quote: 'Happiness is not something ready-made. It comes from your own actions.'
Trivia time: Which planet in our solar system rotates on its side? It's Uranus!
If you want something mind-blowing, consider that there are more stars in the universe than grains of sand on all the beaches on Earth.
How about we dive into some weird history? Did you know people in the Middle Ages used to have contests to see who could make the loudest noise?
